categories.title: Raw Cotton
categories.description: World-famous cotton varieties with detailed specifications and origin regions.

items.title: SHANKAR 6 COTTON
items.summary: World-famous medium staple cotton variety, mostly suitable for knitting (hosiery) yarn due to higher water absorbency. Suitable to produce yarn up to 40s count.

items.title: MCU5 COTTON
items.summary: Long Staple Cotton Variety suitable for Weaving Fine Count Yarn. Suitable to produce yarn from 40s to 60s count.

items.title: DCH 32 COTTON
items.summary: Extra Long Staple Cotton Variety compared with US PIMA and Egyptian Giza. Suitable to produce high yarn count from 80s to 120s range.

items.title: MECH 1 / BUNNY COTTON
items.summary: Medium Staple Cotton Variety suitable to produce weaving yarn count up to 40s.

items.title: J 34 COTTON
items.summary: Medium Staple Cotton Variety suitable to produce weaving yarn count from 20s to 34s. Harvest starts early (Aug–Sep) in North India.

items.title: V 797 COTTON
items.summary: Short Staple coarse cotton variety suitable for Open End Denim Yarn count up to 20s. Small crop size (2.5–3 lakh bales/year).

categories.title: Cotton Yarn
categories.description: 100% cotton yarn range from 20s to 100s, including carded, combed, compact and sustainable certified yarns.

content.title: COTTON YARN
paragraphs: We export the complete range of 100% cotton yarn from India to all international markets – supplying up to 2000 tons of cotton yarn, including carded, combed and compact variety from count range 20's to 100's. This precision and value in our delivery is made possible by a professional workforce which brings rich global experience, keen market insight and a clear understanding of customer needs.

Our yarns are made from the best quality fiber in the most advanced spinning mill unit. The process of mercerization is further used to strengthen our cotton yarns. Highly water-absorbent, soft, and obtained from authentic Indian cotton, our cotton yarn is competitively priced and gives the buyer the best value for money.
Our yarns are mainly exported to countries like China, Korea, Bangladesh, Egypt, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Turkey, Japan, Israel, European Union and Mauritius.
content.certifications: Offering all sustainable certified yarn like Organic, BCI, GRS, IKEA, Primark etc.

categories.title: Cotton Waste
categories.description: Contamination-free cotton waste products for open end spinning and recycling applications.

content.title: Cotton Waste
paragraphs: We are sourcing cotton waste from renowned spinning mills and undergoing various processes with strict quality control in a modern factory to produce contamination free cotton waste.

We offer products with quality, purity and longevity as well as recyclable nature. The company emphasizes a strong business network and supplies cotton waste products in specifications required by clients all over the world.

sections.title: Cotton Waste For Open End Spinning Mill

items.name: Comber Noil
items.spec: Staple Length: 19-20 mm / Strength: 18+ gpt / Mic: 2.8 to 3.5 / Trash: 0-0.05%

items.name: Flat Strips Cotton Waste
items.spec: Staple Length: 24-25 mm / Mic: 3.2 to 3.5 / Trash: 8-12%

items.name: Lickerin Cotton Waste
items.spec: Staple Length: 24-25 mm / Mic: 3.2 to 3.8 / Trash: 30-35%

items.name: Recycle Process Cotton
items.spec: Staple Length: 23-25 mm / Mic: 3.2 to 3.5 / Trash: 12-15%
